stemHtml:
On a Lambert conformal conical chart projection, two waypoints RASNO and LOSUL are connected by a straight line. Given the following information, calculate the latitude of the parallel of origin:

Waypoint RASNO: 34°20.0'N 021°28.0'E
Waypoint LOSUL: 31°41.0'N 025°08.0'E
Initial TT in RASNO: 126°
Initial TT in LOSUL: 308°
